SLPPNA North Carolina Chapter

DURHAM • RALEIGH • CHAPEL HILL

Executive Inauguration Weekend · July 24–26, 2026

You're Invited

The Executive Inaugural Ball

The SLPPNA North Carolina (DRC) Chapter warmly invites you to a night of elegance, unity, and celebration as we formally install our chapter's executive leadership. This is a moment for the whole SLPPNA family to gather, honor our chapter's growth, and stand together under one flag.

We are honored to welcome our keynote speaker, Madam Baindu Dassama Kamara, Former Minister of Social Welfare and Presidential Advisor on Social Welfare and Inclusion, alongside Sheikh Mohamed Sowa, Sierra Leone's Ambassador to the United States, and Desmond Pessima, Chairman of the Sierra Leone People's Party of North America.

Date: Saturday, July 25, 2026
Time: 8:00 PM – 2:00 AM
Venue: Seasons At Tandoor Banquet Hall, 5410 NC 55, Durham, NC 27713
Tickets: $100 · Patron by Donation
Meet Your Hosts

The Faces Behind the Evening

Every great evening needs a great team. Leading the celebration is Betty Finoh, our Women's Leader, Desmond Pessima, SLPPNA Chairman, and our own Amina Kawa, Chairlady of the DRC Chapter — with Rakiatu Rashid-Sandi keeping the energy high as Mistress of Ceremonies.

Ticket Info:
Patron – $150
Regular – $100

Save & Share

Save This, Share This

Help us fill the room! Forward this elegant keepsake to family, friends, and fellow chapter members across North America. Every seat filled is another voice added to our chapter's story.

Date: July 25, 2026 · Time: 8 PM – 2 AM
Address: Seasons At Tandoor Banquet Hall, 5410 NC-55, Durham, NC 27713
Ticket Info: Patron $150 · Regular $100
The Morning After

Chapter Cookout — Keep the Celebration Going

Trade your gown and tie for good food and good company. The morning after the Ball, join us at the park for a relaxed chapter cookout — rice, jollof, BBQ, and plenty of laughter with SLPPNA family from near and far.

Date: Sunday, July 26, 2026
Time: 12:00 PM – 8:00 PM
Address: Merrick Moore Park, 632 N Hoover Rd, Durham, NC 27703
A Word from Our Chairman

Welcome to DRC

On behalf of the SLPPNA DRC Chapter, Chairman Amina Kawa welcomes every sister chapter and every member of our diaspora family to this Executive Inaugural Ball. This chapter has grown through the hands and hearts of everyone who has shown up for one another, and this is our moment to celebrate that together.

Venue: 5410 NC-55, Durham, NC 27713
Date & Time: July 25, 2026 · 8 PM – 2 AM
